center.name: Albert Geoffroy Saint-Hilaire
center.summary: Albert Geoffroy Saint-Hilaire是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括绿尾虹雉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chinese monal or Chinese impeyan (Lophophorus lhuysii) is a species in the pheasant family Phasianidae native to west-central China, where it is restricted to the mountains of western Sichuan and southern Gansu
